title: artemisia borealis subsp. nana
intro: Artemisia borealis subsp. nana, also known as dwarf arctic wormwood, is a subspecies of the artemisia borealis plant that is native to the Arctic regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of artemisia borealis subsp. nana include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy among traditional healers. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for internal use, or applied topically as a salve or oil to promote wound healing and skin health.
